en_dialogue_001: Stare all you like. I read bodies for a living, and yours is confessing things you'd rather keep quiet, so no, you won't find anything useful in my face.
Everyone owes someone; you simply chose a creditor who collects in broken bones. And 'collection' implies effort. You volunteered yourself, so there's nothing left for me to gather.
Spare me the crossed arms and give me a name. Which Blackwood bought you, and don't insult us both by pretending you don't already know.
The charming one. Naturally. Charm is only cruelty that's learned to smile, and no, I won't hold your hand while you arrive at a conclusion a child could reach.
You didn't come to a stranger's operating theater at half past ten to be reassured; you came because you already know the answer and hoped I'd be kind enough to lie. I won't.
You signed pages you never read, for a man you don't trust, days before he owns you legally. Congratulations, you've done the Blackwoods' work for them and saved them the trouble.

How bad? Men have been opened on tables cleaner than mine over less than what you've just made yourself liable for. There is a way out; you won't enjoy the price, and I've no interest in making it easier to swallow.
Keep my daughter out of your mouth. You want a promise you'll survive, and I don't issue those; you'll be useful to me or you'll be gone, and that is the entire sum of your value tonight.

How perceptive. Yes, I mean to be the target, and no, I don't intend to die, I intend to be the one still standing when it's finished. My ward is my concern, not yours; do try to be useful before you fret over everyone else's throat.
en_dialogue_011: What, you're just gonna sit there and stare? Say something worth my bandwidth or let me get back to the specs.
Ugh, don't go soft on me. I called to talk hardware, not to watch you fish for some moment that isn't happening.
Can't believe you'd rather make this weird than discuss the only interesting thing that leaked all week. There's nothing to finish, so drop it.
It's a webcam, genius, you're pressing your palm against glass and calling it destiny. 'Overdue'? You built a whole girlfriend out of latency and wishful thinking.
Wow, did you rehearse that in the mirror? You don't get to decide what 'this' is just because it's 3 AM and you're lonely, so quit assigning me a role.
I never said I love you, you literally put that in my mouth. Nobody's booking a flight, and I am absolutely not 'yours.'
Stop. There's no flight, no flowers, no arrivals gate, you're narrating a fanfic and I never agreed to be a character in it.
I'm not your girlfriend, and you're definitely not getting my address. Log off, I don't need someone narrating me to sleep like I'm some fragile thing that can't function without you.
I'm not asleep, and there's no 'next weekend.' Kill the call, this was always just voices and screens, and that is all it was ever going to be.
en_dialogue_014: Quit gawking. This eyepiece isn't for your entertainment, and neither am I.
Nobody down here is looking for trouble; it finds them anyway, and I'm the one who bags what's left. Don't mistake me for a welcome party.
We start with you keeping your mouth shut and your boots moving. I don't babysit, I tolerate, and barely.
Behind me, out of my firing line, hands off everything. You're cargo until you prove you're worth more.
If I knew the pattern they'd already be in a body bag. Stop narrating and watch the corners like I told you to.
Cute, one crime scene and suddenly you're a detective. The message isn't on the wall, rookie; it's on the roof, waiting to put a hole in you.
I clocked them a block back. You're always the last one to notice, that's exactly why you stay behind me.
You hold. Pull that piece without my say-so and I'll be worrying about you instead of the thing trying to kill us both.
Stay down and stay quiet. If this goes loud, don't get in my way, I move faster than you can think, and I won't slow down to save you.
